name: Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D
hypothesis: Short-term momentum normalized by longer-term volatility captures risk-adjusted trend signals that predict cross-sectional returns

name: Volume_Price_Divergence_10D
hypothesis: Divergence between short-term and long-term volume-price correlation indicates regime shifts that predict future returns

name: Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D
hypothesis: Mean-reversion in normalized intraday range indicates overbought/oversold conditions in volatility that predict price reversals

name: foreign_vol_confirm
hypothesis: Foreign flow confirmed by relative volume

name: meanrev_vol_filter
hypothesis: Mean reversion filtered by short-term volatility

name: foreign_trend_resi
hypothesis: Return residual (after foreign flow) with trend direction

name: combo_Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D_plus_Volume_Price_Divergence_10D
expression: RANK(RANK(TS_MEAN($return, 5) / (TS_STD($return, 20) + 1e-8)) * SIGN(DELTA($close, 5) / ($close + 1e-8))) + RANK(TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 10) - TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 40))
hypothesis: Additive combination of Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D and Volume_Price_Divergence_10D

name: combo_Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D_times_Volume_Price_Divergence_10D
expression: RANK(RANK(TS_MEAN($return, 5) / (TS_STD($return, 20) + 1e-8)) * SIGN(DELTA($close, 5) / ($close + 1e-8))) * RANK(TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 10) - TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 40))
hypothesis: Multiplicative combination of Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D and Volume_Price_Divergence_10D

name: combo_Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D_plus_Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D
hypothesis: Additive combination of Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D and Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D

name: combo_Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D_times_Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D
hypothesis: Multiplicative combination of Adaptive_Momentum_Volatility_Ratio_20D and Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D

name: combo_Volume_Price_Divergence_10D_plus_Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D
expression: RANK(TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 10) - TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 40)) + RANK(ZSCORE(TS_MEAN(($high - $low) / ($close + 1e-8), 5) - TS_MEAN(($high - $low) / ($close + 1e-8), 15)))
hypothesis: Additive combination of Volume_Price_Divergence_10D and Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D

name: combo_Volume_Price_Divergence_10D_times_Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D
expression: RANK(TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 10) - TS_CORR(RANK($volume), RANK($close), 40)) * RANK(ZSCORE(TS_MEAN(($high - $low) / ($close + 1e-8), 5) - TS_MEAN(($high - $low) / ($close + 1e-8), 15)))
hypothesis: Multiplicative combination of Volume_Price_Divergence_10D and Intraday_Range_Mean_Reversion_15D
